title: Kraken to Acquire NinjaTrader: Introducing the Next Era of Professional Trading Kraken has entered into an agreement to acquire NinjaTrader, the leading U.S. retail futures trading platform, for $1.5 billion, subject to certain purchase price adjustments.
raw_text: Makes Kraken a leader in the U.S. futures market for both traditional and crypto trading, and accelerates its multi-asset-class ambitions — which include plans for equities trading and payments. CHEYENNE, Wyo.--Kraken, one of the longest-standing, most liquid and secure crypto platforms serving more than 15 million clients globally, has entered into an agreement to acquire NinjaTrader, the leading U.S. retail futures trading platform, for $1.5 billion, subject to certain purchase price adjustments. This acquisition strengthens Kraken’s position as a 24/7, always-on technology platform built for professional traders, making it a leader in U.S. futures for both traditional and crypto markets.

limitations: Discovered from the official Kraken press index.
